evidence: Clicked Close room button on sidebar room entry. Dialog appeared with text 'Close room?' and 'Active conversations will end.' with Cancel and Close buttons.
Clicked Close Room button in room detail header. Same confirmation dialog appeared.
Cancel button dismisses the dialog without closing the room.

ten_point_check.error_state: not tested - did not actually close a room
ten_point_check.keyboard_nav: not tested - Esc key not verified
ten_point_check.console_errors: not checked for this specific action
ten_point_check.destructive_confirmation: pass - confirmation dialog appears before action
ten_point_check.back_undo: pass - Cancel returns to previous state

evidence: In room detail view, below the chat messages, the text 'All agents are offline. Start room to launch sessions (uses API credits).' is displayed next to the Start Room button.
The explanation clearly communicates that starting a room launches sessions and uses API credits.

ten_point_check.loading_state: not tested - did not start a room
ten_point_check.console_errors: not checked for this specific action

verifications.description: Running on Machine sessions show distinguishing info
evidence: Running on Machine entries now show: project directory name (e.g. 'AgentStudio'), model badge ('opus'), running time ('3h 37m', '29m'), and Kill process button.
When two sessions are in the same directory, they show the same project name but can be distinguished by uptime.
Recent Sessions also show project context (e.g. 'InPipeline', 'AgentStudio', 'pmo . InPipeline') with time-ago info.
verifications.notes: Improvement from run 1: sessions previously showed only 'Claude Session' which was indistinguishable. Now they show directory name + model + uptime. However, sessions in the same directory still share the same label.

evidence: Total cost '$128.3' is visible in the top bar between the Sessions/Teams/Memory/Settings tabs and the usage indicator.
The total cost updates dynamically (observed changing from $127.3 to $128.3 during testing).
Per-session cost badges are NOT visible in the sidebar session list (Recent Sessions shows prompt text, project name, and time-ago but no cost).
Per-session cost badges are NOT visible in the Running on Machine section (shows model, uptime, but no cost).
Cannot verify terminal header cost badges because no active sessions are visible in the Sessions tab.

ten_point_check.happy_path: partial - total cost visible, per-session cost missing from sidebar

new_issues.description: Per-session cost badges are not visible in the sidebar session list or Running on Machine section. TASK-1 specified per-session cost badges in sidebar and terminal headers, but only the total cost in the top bar is implemented.

evidence: No sun/moon toggle button exists in the top bar. The top bar contains: Sessions, Teams, Memory, Settings, $cost, usage indicator, Limits, Fullscreen, Off-Peak indicator, Help & Guide, agent-studio.
No theme toggle exists in the Settings page.
The entire app is consistently dark-themed.

ten_point_check.happy_path: pass - no toggle, app is dark-only

regression_checks.notes: All rooms display correctly with agent counts, message counts, and Close room buttons. Active and Archived sections properly separated.
Room detail shows agent badges, chat history, Start Room button with explanation text, and message input. Close Room button in detail header also has confirmation dialog.
Memory tab loads and displays entries with search, filtering by category, and detail view.
Settings page shows Workspace, General, PMO Scheduler, System Monitor, Keyboard Shortcuts, and About sections. All appear functional.
Empty state shows 'No active sessions' with helpful text and preset buttons (Quick Chat, Start Sprint, Continue Last).
Recent Sessions shows 20 entries with truncated prompts, project names, time-ago info, and Resume buttons.
Top bar shows all expected elements: tabs, total cost, usage, Limits, Fullscreen, Off-Peak indicator, Help, app name.

new_issues.description: Per-session cost badges missing from sidebar and Running on Machine section. TASK-1 specified cost badges in sidebar and terminal headers, but only the total cost in the top bar was implemented. Individual session entries (both in Recent Sessions and Running on Machine) show no cost information.
new_issues.checklist_item: Can I see the cost of each session?

identity_compliance.dark_everywhere: pass - no light leaks detected, all surfaces are dark
identity_compliance.geist_mono_only: pass - all text appears monospace throughout
identity_compliance.amber_accent_only: pass - amber used for active states, no random accent colors detected
identity_compliance.text_sizing: pass - body text appears consistent at 13px, section headers at 14px
identity_compliance.compact_spacing: pass - information density is high, no excessive padding
identity_compliance.voice_tone: pass - empty state says 'No active sessions' (matter-of-fact), Start Room text is direct, confirmation dialog says 'Close room? Active conversations will end.' (direct and clear)
identity_compliance.no_emoji_in_ui_chrome: pass - no emoji in UI chrome elements
identity_compliance.emoji_in_agent_responses: fail - agent responses still contain emoji (checkmarks, red circles, package icons) which violates IDENTITY.md
identity_compliance.next_js_dev_tools: fail - Next.js Dev Tools badge with '1 Issue' still visible at bottom left

summary: 4 of 5 targeted fixes verified from a user perspective. TASK-5 (Close Room confirmation) fully works with proper dialog. TASK-3 (Start Room explanation) shows clear text about launching sessions and using API credits. TASK-2 (Running on Machine distinguishing info) now shows project directory name + model + uptime instead of generic 'Claude Session'. TASK-6 (Light mode toggle) successfully removed. TASK-1 (Cost tracking) is partially implemented: total cost shows in top bar but per-session cost badges are missing from sidebar and session entries. No regressions detected in any other features.
